summary: Iter 207: Full validation of e-signature freeze + Budget Reform outreach + chip-filter UX polish. Backend pytest 3/3 PASS (freeze on signature, 423 on v2 upload, 404 unknown family, signed audit log). Frontend: all 8 PageShell routes render with no console errors. Vault-documents shows SIGNED·FROZEN amber badge and 'signed by {email} via {provider}' meta on seeded frozen family. WebhooksAdmin / ExecutionRails / AdviserHub all expose new ChipFilter components with correct data-testids. BudgetExposure outreach buttons are conditionally rendered (sellWindowCount=0 with current seeded data — none of the 7 active clients have B_transitional NG + swing>$50K — request explicitly notes this is expected).

backend_pytest.test_freeze_on_signature: PASS — upload v1 → POST /api/e-signature/event → versions_frozen=1, audit_id starts with 'esig_', status returns is_frozen=true with signer/envelope/provider; v2 upload returns 423 'frozen'
backend_pytest.test_signed_log_includes_recent_event: PASS — GET /api/e-signature/signed returns recent envelope in audit list

frontend_pages./budget-exposure: shell=1, bulk-outreach-btn=0, sell-window-row-*=0, row-email-*=0, row-ics-*=0 (correctly hidden because sellWindowCount=0 — no client has B_transitional NG AND swing>$50K in seed data; max swing in seed is $38.5K Michael & Lisa Chen). Conditional rendering verified — buttons appear ONLY when count>0.
frontend_pages./webhooks-admin: chips=4 with labels [All1, Delivered1, Failed0, Pending0]. data-testid='webhook-status-{value}' all present.
frontend_pages./execution-rails: chips=5 with labels [All27, Pending20, Executing2, Completed5, Failed0]. data-testid='ticket-status-{value}' all present. Clicking 'Pending' chip works (no errors).
frontend_pages./adviser-hub: filter-all=1, filter-active=1, filter-prospect=1, filter-review=1. ChipFilter replaces old button group as requested.
frontend_pages./vault-documents: Seeded family TEST_FROZEN_VAULT_3dc0a7 is visible. SIGNED·FROZEN amber badge renders. Meta line shows 'signed by advisor@truthwealth.au via docusign'. Lock icon present in badge.
frontend_pages.regression_pageshell: All 8 routes (/deals, /budget-exposure, /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin, /execution-rails, /adviser-hub, /retirement-workshop) render data-testid='page-shell' = 1, zero console errors, zero page errors.

seed_data_creation: Seeded one frozen vault family: family_key='TEST_FROZEN_VAULT_3dc0a7', signer='advisor@truthwealth.au', provider='docusign', envelope_id='env_test_<rand>'. Visible on /vault-documents. Plus 6 other TEST_esig_* families from pytest runs (3 sign events frozen, 3 from prior iters) — all show SIGNED·FROZEN badge correctly.
test_credentials: No login. localStorage seeded via add_init_script: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser'.
action_items: None — all P2 (Budget Reform outreach wiring), P3 (e-sign webhook freeze + audit), P3 (Execution Rails real adapters fallback-to-mock) and the optional ChipFilter rollouts on WebhooksAdmin/ExecutionRails/AdviserHub are working as specified.

Optional UX nit (not a defect): With current seeded clients, no row qualifies for sell-window alert (max swing is $38.5K, threshold is $50K), so the 'Draft N outreach email(s)' pill and per-row Mail/CalendarPlus buttons never appear on the live page. To smoke-test the actual button click + ICS download + /api/notify/client integration end-to-end, main agent could seed a client with NG status 'B_transitional' AND CGT swing >$50K, OR temporarily lower the threshold in BudgetExposureReport.jsx for a manual visual check.
critical_code_review_comments: esignature.py is clean — proper async, HMAC verify constant-time, audit row excludes _id leak, outbound webhook emit wrapped in try/except so failure of webhooks subsystem won't 500 the inbound event. Good.
local_files.py _persist() correctly raises HTTPException(423) before disk write — no orphan files created on frozen family.

BudgetExposureReport.jsx — verify that sellWindowCount derivation uses the SAME predicate as the per-row sellWindowAlert flag (otherwise bulk-outreach button may show while no row buttons render). Worth a quick code-read by main agent.
WebhooksAdmin chip-filter labels include in-line counts (e.g. 'Delivered1') — minor: a thin space or parens 'Delivered (1)' would be more readable. Cosmetic only.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all observable criteria; sell-window outreach buttons not visually triggered due to seed-data gap (request acknowledges this is expected)

context_for_next_testing_agent: E-signature freeze flow is wired end-to-end: POST /api/e-signature/event freezes ALL versions in storage_objects + writes rbac_audit row + emits deal.signed outbound webhook + advances deal stage if deal_id present. Subsequent /api/files/upload-base64 with same family_key returns 423. Frontend VaultDocuments shows SIGNED·FROZEN amber badge + 'signed by {email} via {provider}' meta when latest version has is_frozen=true. ChipFilter component (in PageShell.jsx) is now used on /webhooks-admin (data-testid='webhook-status-*'), /execution-rails (data-testid='ticket-status-*'), and /adviser-hub (preserves data-testid='filter-*'). Budget-exposure outreach UI (bulk button + per-row email/invite buttons) is implemented and present in DOM but conditional on sellWindowCount>0; current seed has zero such rows.
